top_stories.title: VAST Data Unveils Polaris for Global AI Data Control
top_stories.description: Industry’s first global control plane purpose-built for AI data infrastructure spanning hyperscale cloud and datacenter deployments Today at VAST Forward 2026, VAST Data, the AI Operating System company, announced Polaris, a global control plane designed to provision, operate and orchestrate distributed AI infrastructure across public cloud, neocloud and on-premises datacenter environments. Polaris transforms... The post VAST Data Unveils Polaris for Global AI Data Control first appeared on...

top_stories.title: How to Build an Elastic Vector Database with Consistent Hashing, Sharding, and Live Ring Visualization for RAG Systems
top_stories.description: In this tutorial, we build an elastic vector database simulator that mirrors how modern RAG systems shard embeddings across distributed storage nodes. We implement consistent hashing with virtual nodes to ensure balanced placement and minimal reshuffling as the system scales. We visualize the hashing ring in real time and interactively add or remove nodes to […] The post How to Build an Elastic Vector Database with Consistent Hashing, Sharding, and Live Ring Visualization for RAG Systems...
top_stories.author: Michal Sutter
top_stories.content: In this tutorial, we build an elastic vector database simulator that mirrors how modern RAG systems shard embeddings across distributed storage nodes. We implement consistent hashing with virtual nodes to ensure balanced placement and minimal reshuffling as the system scales. top_stories.title: Greenspace Automates EPSDT Reporting with New Integration
top_stories.description: Greenspace’s MBC platform automates data capture, validation and submission to LACDMH via EHRs for faster, more accurate reporting Greenspace Health has expanded their integration capabilities with Electronic Health Records (EHRs) to automate Los Angeles County Department of Mental Health (LACDMH) reporting requirements. top_stories.title: Large model inference container – latest capabilities and performance enhancements
top_stories.description: AWS recently released significant updates to the Large Model Inference (LMI) container, delivering comprehensive performance improvements, expanded model support, and streamlined deployment capabilities for customers hosting LLMs on AWS. These releases focus on reducing operational complexity while delivering measurable performance gains across popular model architectures.
top_stories.author: Dmitry Soldatkin
top_stories.content: AWS recently released significant updates to the Large Model Inference (LMI) container, delivering comprehensive performance improvements, expanded model support, and streamlined deployment capabilities for customers hosting LLMs on AWS. These releases focus on reducing operational complexity while delivering measurable performance gains across popular model architectures.

top_stories.title: OpenAI and Microsoft join UK’s international coalition to safeguard AI development
top_stories.description: OpenAI and Microsoft pledge funding to AI Security Institute’s Alignment Project: an international effort on AI systems that are safe, secure and under control.
top_stories.content: OpenAI and Microsoft pledge funding to AI Security Institute’s Alignment Project: an international effort on AI systems that are safe, secure and under control.
